parameters.query:
INSERT INTO gap_scores (
  herb_id, category_id, classical_mentions, classical_prominence_score,
  in_vitro_count, in_vivo_count, clinical_trial_count, review_count,
  modern_validation_score, last_calculated
)
SELECT 
  hda.herb_id,
  tc.category_id,  -- NULL for 23/24 unmapped categories ✅
  SUM(hda.classical_mentions),
  AVG(COALESCE(hda.prominence_score, 1)),
  COUNT(CASE WHEN msc.study_type = 'in_vitro' THEN 1 END),
  COUNT(CASE WHEN msc.study_type = 'in_vivo' THEN 1 END),
  COUNT(CASE WHEN msc.study_type = 'clinical_trial' THEN 1 END),
  COUNT(CASE WHEN msc.study_type IN ('review', 'metaanalysis') THEN 1 END),
  ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(msc.llm_confidence, 0))::numeric, 3)::double precision,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
FROM herb_disease_associations hda
JOIN herbs_master hm ON hda.herb_id = hm.herb_id
LEFT JOIN therapeutic_categories tc ON hda.disease_category = tc.category_name
LEFT JOIN modern_studies_classified msc ON hda.association_id = msc.association_id
WHERE hm.botanical_name IS NOT NULL AND hm.skip_reason IS NULL
GROUP BY hda.herb_id, tc.category_id
ON CONFLICT (herb_id, category_id) DO UPDATE SET
  classical_mentions = EXCLUDED.classical_mentions,
  clinical_trial_count = EXCLUDED.clinical_trial_count,
  modern_validation_score = EXCLUDED.modern_validation_score,
  last_calculated = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_gap_analysis AS
WITH pair_metrics AS (
  SELECT 
    hda.association_id,
    hda.herb_id,
    hm.botanical_name AS herb,
    hm.sanskrit_name,
    hda.disease_id,
    dm.english_name AS disease,
    hda.disease_category,
    hda.prominence_score,
    hda.classical_mentions,
    COALESCE(msr.paper_count, 0) AS total_modern_studies,
    GREATEST(0, 
      (COALESCE(hda.prominence_score, 0) * 10) - 
      LEAST(COALESCE(msr.paper_count, 0) * 0.5, 5)
    ) AS raw_gap_score
  FROM herb_disease_associations hda
  JOIN herbs_master hm ON hda.herb_id = hm.herb_id
  JOIN diseases_master dm ON hda.disease_id = dm.disease_id
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT association_id, COUNT(*) AS paper_count
    FROM modern_studies_raw GROUP BY association_id
  ) msr ON hda.association_id = msr.association_id
  WHERE hda.association_type = 'indicated'
    AND hda.skip_reason IS NULL
)
SELECT 
  pm.association_id, pm.herb, pm.sanskrit_name, pm.disease, pm.disease_category,
  pm.classical_mentions, pm.prominence_score,
  pm.total_modern_studies,
  ROUND(pm.raw_gap_score::numeric, 2) AS gap_score,
  CASE 
    WHEN pm.raw_gap_score >= 8 THEN 1
    WHEN pm.raw_gap_score >= 5 THEN 2
    WHEN pm.raw_gap_score >= 3 THEN 3
    ELSE 5
  END AS priority_rank,
  CASE 
    WHEN pm.total_modern_studies = 0 THEN 'CRITICAL: No studies'
    WHEN pm.raw_gap_score >= 5 THEN 'HIGH GAP'
    ELSE 'LOW PRIORITY'
  END AS research_recommendation,
  COALESCE(msr_max.fetched_max, '1900-01-01'::timestamp) AS last_evidence_date
FROM pair_metrics pm
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT association_id, MAX(fetched_at) AS fetched_max
  FROM modern_studies_raw GROUP BY association_id
) msr_max ON pm.association_id = msr_max.association_id
ORDER BY pm.raw_gap_score DESC NULLS LAST, pm.prominence_score desc;
